# Module Notes

Optional deeper cache files for one project area at a time.

Use this folder when a topic is too detailed for `../repo-cache.md` but too stable to rediscover every session.

Good candidates:

- command routing
- provider or external API boundary
- database or storage layout
- auth and permissions
- parser or protocol behavior
- build and release flow
- UI state model

Keep one topic per file and point back to the owning source files.
